data.title: PRIMA launches Miami Marketplace with over 70 top restaurants like Sparrow, MILA, Estiatorio Milos, Catch, Queen, L'Atelier de Joël Robuchon, connecting high-value guests with venues.
data.description: Several popular restaurants in Miami, including Sparrow, MILA, Estiatorio Milos, Catch, Queen, and L'Atelier de Joël Robuchon, have signed up with a new platform aimed at connecting esteemed guests with sought-after dining establishments. This platform, named PRIMA, was launched on August 25, 2025. PRIMA serves as a hospitality marketplace focused on bridging the accessibility and operational efficiency challenges within the dining industry. The platform aims to streamline the process for high-value patrons to secure reservations at these renowned venues, offering a solution for enhancing the dining experience.

data.title: ROKFORM introduces new magnetic power banks in 10,000mAh and 5,000mAh models for active lifestyles.
data.description: In Irvine, California on August 25, 2025, ROKFORM unveiled two advanced magnetic power banks. The first is the 10,000mAh Wireless Magnetic Power Bank with Stand, offering high capacity for prolonged use. The second is the 5,000mAh Magnetic Power Bank, designed for on-the-go charging needs. ROKFORM is renowned for its durable and high-performance mobile accessories, and these new releases aim to uphold that reputation.

data.title: Locksley and Rice University sign R&D agreement for antimony processing technology, potential future licensing opportunity.
data.description: In San Bernardino, California, on August 25, 2025, Locksley Resources Limited disclosed the signing of a significant Research & Development Agreement with Rice University, located in Houston. The agreement involves collaborative research efforts, emphasizing on potential future opportunities for licensing. Locksley Resources Limited is listed on the ASX as LKY and on the OTCQB as LKYRF. This strategic collaboration signifies a potential for innovative developments and commercialization, set to leverage the resources and expertise of both entities.

data.title: Windward Management encourages faster value creation for Cineplex Inc. through an open letter and presentation.
data.description: In Miami Beach, Windward Management LP released an open letter and presentation titled "Lights, Camera, Action" directed to Cineplex Inc.'s management team and board of directors. The letter was addressed to Cineplex, Inc., specifically to the Board of Directors and Management Team located at 1303 Yonge Street, Toronto, Ontario, Canada M4T 2Y9. The communication was dated August 25, 2025, and aimed at engaging with the recipients regarding various matters. This initiative by Windward Management LP signifies a significant development in the strategic dialogue with Cineplex Inc., highlighting a proactive approach towards addressing key issues within the company.

data.title: DDC Enterprise doubles Bitcoin holdings in August, acquiring 200 BTC, totaling 888 BTC. Average cost: $107,447. Yield: 1572%.
data.description: DDC Enterprise Limited disclosed its latest Bitcoin investment, marking their fourth purchase this August with an acquisition of 200 BTC. The Company now possesses a total of 888 BTC, a significant rise from the 368 BTC held earlier this month. Notable aspects of the purchase include a treasury boost of 200 BTC and an average cost of USD 107,447 per bitcoin. This move showcases DDC's remarkable growth in treasury holdings, surpassing a milestone of over double the assets owned since the start of August, and highlighting an improved yield of 1572%.

data.title: Functional beverages market in the US to grow significantly by 2025 with rise in popularity of immunity-boosting drinks, cognitive enhancers, & personalized nutrition.
data.description: The market for functional beverages in the USA is experiencing significant growth, as highlighted in the "USA Functional Beverages Market Updates 2025" report available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. Consumers are showing a growing interest in health-focused and convenient beverage choices, leading to the surge in demand for functional beverages. Key trends in the market include the increasing popularity of immunity-boosting beverages, cognitive enhancers, and personalized nutrition driven by AI technology. The report provides insights into ingredients, new product developments, market dynamics, prominent brands, key players, popular niches, and the involvement of large corporations in this sector.

data.title: Applebee’s appoints Michelle Chin as CMO & Jay Wong as COO, showing brand's focus on innovation. Michelle starts on Sept 2.
data.description: In Pasadena, California, Applebee’s Neighborhood Grill + Bar has appointed Michelle Chin as Chief Marketing Officer and Jerrold (Jay) Wong as Chief Operations Officer. This move signifies the brand's dedication to innovative strategies, operational efficiency, and sustainable expansion. Michelle will commence her position on September 2, while Jay will officially start on September 15. This development comes at a time of positive momentum for Applebee’s, with a reported rise in foot traffic.

data.title: Evolus reports positive results from trial of injectable HA gel product, Evolysse™ Sculpt at Cosmetic Bootcamp. #EOLS
data.description: In Newport Beach, California, Evolus, Inc. revealed upbeat findings from a key U.S. study of Evolysse™ Sculpt, an injectable hyaluronic acid (HA) gel aimed at enhancing mid-face volume. The company, listed on NASDAQ as EOLS, focuses on cultivating a range of consumer aesthetic brands. The successful outcomes mark a significant advancement for Evolus as they branch out from Jeuveau® with the Evolysse™ line, strengthening their position in the beauty market.

data.title: Empire State Building debuts 'KPOP DEMON HUNTERS' music-to-light show with Netflix, CAPE USA, iHeartMedia. Stars visit.
data.description: In New York, the Empire State Building debuted a Music-to-Light Spectacular for the start of “KPOP DEMON HUNTERS” Golden Weekend on Aug. 22. The event was in collaboration with Netflix and the Coalition of Asian Pacifics in Entertainment (CAPE), and also had support from iHeartMedia. Stars of the film, Arden Cho, May Hong, and singer REI AMI, participated in a special tower lighting ceremony earlier in the day. They flipped the iconic light switch at the Empire State Building.

data.title: Bitcoin drops to $111,000, XRP falls under $3 as Ethereum hits new ATH at $4,588.97. 166,734 traders liquidated, losing $839.78M. $23.2M outflows and $341.2M inflows in spot ETFs. Trading lower despite macro jitters.
data.description: Cryptocurrency markets experienced a decrease in trading on Monday, despite Ethereum hitting a new all-time high on Sunday. The current prices are as follows: Bitcoin at $111,217.31, Ethereum at $4,588.97, Solana at $196.37, XRP at $2.93, Dogecoin at $0.2189, and Shiba Inu at $0.00001238. Coinglass data revealed that 166,734 traders were liquidated in the last 24 hours, resulting in losses amounting to $839.78 million. Additionally, SoSoValue data indicated net outflows of $23.2 million from spot Bitcoin ETFs, while spot Ethereum ETFs saw net inflows of $341.2 million. Altcoin Sherpa highlighted Bitcoin's struggle to maintain its range and cautioned that a breakdown of the range low could lead to exiting all trades. For more information, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Dow falls before Nvidia earnings and inflation data; Palantir stock declines. Live coverage on Investors Business Daily.
data.description: On Monday, the Dow Jones Industrial Average experienced a decline as investors awaited Nvidia's earnings report and important inflation figures. Shares of Palantir also saw a drop in value. This recent market update showcases the Dow's decrease prior to significant events, indicating a level of caution among traders. The situation highlights the impact of company reports and economic data on stock performance.

data.title: Dow Jones futures drop after Powell-led rally, with S&P 500 and Dow Jones hitting new highs. Nvidia earnings awaited.
data.description: Federal Reserve Chairman Powell's optimistic remarks on Friday led to a significant market surge, resulting in record highs for both the S&P 500 and Dow Jones indices. Multiple stocks showed indications for investors to buy. The focus now shifts to Nvidia's upcoming earnings report as the next important market event following Powell's speech. Dow Jones Futures dropped post-rally, setting the stage for Nvidia to become the next significant market indicator.

data.title: Argenx's Vyvgart trial success leads to FDA label expansion; Phase 3 trial showed significant improvement in MG patients.
data.description: Argenx SE shared new findings from the Phase 3 ADAPT SERON study of Vyvgart (IV: efgartigimod alfa-fcab) on Monday. The study involved participants who were randomized 1:1 in Part A to receive either 4 weekly infusions of efgartigimod IV or a placebo. This was followed by a 5-week follow-up period for primary analysis. In Part B, an open-label extension, participants were given 2 fixed cycles of 4 weekly efgartigimod infusions with a 4-week interval between cycles. Starting from cycle 3, additional cycles could be initiated at least 1 week after the previous cycle, based on clinical assessment. The study successfully met its primary goal, showing that AChR-Ab seronegative gMG patients treated with Vyvgart saw a statistically significant and clinically meaningful enhancement in MG-ADL. Full details can be found on Benzinga.com.
